description: Mobile UI Bug Fixes — Fix avatar size on friend cards, fix username/badge overlap on mobile, change active nav icon color from green to accent-pink

userStories.title: Fix profile avatar size and alignment on friend cards
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want the profile avatar on friend cards to be properly sized and vertically centered so it looks polished.
acceptanceCriteria: Avatar on friend list cards uses `size="md"` (40px) instead of `size="sm"` (32px) in `apps/web/src/app/(main)/friends/page.tsx`
Avatar is vertically centered relative to the friend name and email text
Also update avatars in the pending requests cards to `size="md"` for consistency
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fix username/badge overlap on mobile friend cards
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want the friend card layout to stack vertically on narrow screens so the username doesn't overlap with the Burn Buddy badge and Remove button.
acceptanceCriteria: Friend card layout in `apps/web/src/app/(main)/friends/page.tsx` stacks vertically on mobile — name/username/email on top row, badge and action buttons on bottom row
On desktop (md+ breakpoint), keep the current side-by-side layout
Username text is truncated with ellipsis if it's still too long on very narrow screens
Badge ('🔥 Burn Buddy') and 'Remove' button are left-aligned below the name on mobile
No visual regression on desktop-width screens
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Change active nav icon color from green to accent-pink
userStories.description: As a user, I want the active tab icon in the bottom nav bar to use the brand accent-pink color (#FF2D55) instead of green so it matches the app's design language.
acceptanceCriteria: Active icon color in `HomeIcon`, `FriendsIcon`, and `AccountIcon` components in `apps/web/src/components/NavBar.tsx` changed from `#30D158` to `#FF2D55`
Active label text color remains `text-primary` (orange) — only the SVG icon stroke changes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: The accent-pink color #FF2D55 is already defined in globals.css as --color-accent-pink and in tailwind.config.ts
